metadata.description: Product on Purpose: thematic AI agent skill and tool collections for product work.

plugins.name: pm-skills
plugins.description: Product management skills, sub-agents, and sprint tools across the full product lifecycle. Follows the agentskills.io specification.

plugins.name: thinking-framework-skills
plugins.description: Evidence-graded, agent-executable thinking-method skills: each is reduced to its working mechanism, graded honestly on its evidence, and produces a concrete artifact. Follows the agentskills.io specification.
